g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the student login and portal flow')
sendPrompt('How does activity selection work in the UI?')
sendPrompt('What are the dynamic recommendation popups?')
sendPrompt('What does the summary submission step contain?')
sendPrompt('How is DistilBERT fine-tuned for activity recommendation?')
sendPrompt('Explain label-based chained recommendation logic')
sendPrompt('What is the inspection dataset structure provided by the client?')
sendPrompt('What hazard parameters get recommended?')
sendPrompt('Explain severity and likelihood scoring')
sendPrompt('What is MOC recommendation?')
sendPrompt('What goes into the remarks field?')

svg.text: Layer 3 — LLM layer (Azure OpenAI GPT-4o mini)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the LLM generate quiz questions from recommendation data?')
sendPrompt('How does the student answer quiz and what is validated?')
sendPrompt('How is the Azure OpenAI GPT-4o mini prompt engineered for quiz and chatbot?')
sendPrompt('Explain the inspection lead and approver sign-off flow')
sendPrompt('What does the approver review and approve?')
sendPrompt('What is the PostgreSQL schema for storing recommendations?')
sendPrompt('How is Q&A data stored and linked to recommendations?')
sendPrompt('How does pgvector store and index embeddings?')
sendPrompt('What chunking strategy is best for this inspection data?')
sendPrompt('Which embedding model should we use for this domain?')
sendPrompt('How does HNSW index work in pgvector?')
sendPrompt('What query preprocessing happens before retrieval?')
sendPrompt('How does hybrid retrieval work combining BM25 and vector search?')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM generate grounded answers from retrieved chunks?')
sendPrompt('How does a cross-encoder reranker improve retrieval quality?')
sendPrompt('What is a self-querying retriever for structured metadata?')
sendPrompt('Explain conversational memory buffer in the chatbot')
sendPrompt('What does the final chatbot answer look like to inspection leads?')
